query: salvage brachytherapy base tongue recurrence functional outcomes

results.title: Salvage brachytherapy for local recurrence of cancer after definitive irradiation: a GEC-ESTRO narrative review.
results.snippet:
PubMed ID: 40472997. 2025/08/01 00:00. PURPOSE: To evaluate the clinical efficacy and toxicity of brachytherapy as a 
salvage therapy for patients with recurrent glioblastoma (rGBM).
METHODS AND MATERIALS: We searched the PubMed, Embase, and Cochrane libraries 
from its inception to June 2023, for eligible studies in which patients 
underwent brachytherapy for rGBM. Outcomes of interest were mOS, mPFS, OS, PFS, 
and adverse events (AEs). For individual clinical survival outcomes and common 
AEs,
